creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, I'm starving. You wanna go to Taco Bell for lunch today? I'm down, I'll get the four-piece chicken strip, a crunchy taco, and a Baja Blast Zero. Dang, how'd you know to order that? Bro, you don't follow Seth G. yet? Damn, I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G. right now.
caption: Comment "FASTFOOD" for my FREE cheat sheet of fast food swaps. If your in a tough spot, and your only option is Taco Bell, order this: 4 piece chicken strips + crunchy taco + Baja Blast Zero (640 calories 39 G protein). This will save you over 1,000 calories & help you stay on track with your fitness journey.

swaps.swap_meal: 4-piece Chicken Strips + Crunchy Taco + Baja Blast Zero

parsed.notes: Single swap at Taco Bell. Saves over 1,300 calories from typical order.
